markdown.markdown: ::::::: hero-header ::: hero-logo ![](images/lablogo.png){alt="CALM Lab logo"} ::: ::::: hero-text ::: hero-subtitle Control of Attention in Life and Mind ::: ::: hero-title CALM LAB ::: ::: hero-sub-subtitle UNC Wilmington ::: ::::: ::::::: ::: hero-intro The CALM Lab at the University of North Carolina Wilmington studies the control of attention across contexts of life and mind, combining cognitive psychology, neuroscience, and contemplative practices to understand how attention shapes thought, success, and well-being. ::: :::::::::::: {.grid-3 .section-shell} ::::: {.card .card-interactive .quick-card .is-blue} ::: {.icon-badge .icon-badge-sm} ::: Meet the researchers and students working in the CALM Lab. [Meet the Team →]{.link-cta} ::::: ::::: {.card .card-interactive .quick-card .is-yellow} ::: {.icon-badge .icon-badge-sm} ::: ### Projects Explore our research on attention control, brain networks, and mindfulness. [Explore Projects →]{.link-cta} ::::: ::::: {.card .card-interactive .quick-card .is-green} ::: {.icon-badge .icon-badge-sm} ::: ### Connect Interested in collaborating, joining the lab, or connecting with us? [Get in Touch →]{.link-cta} ::::: :::::::::::: ------------------------------------------------------------------------ # [Latest News]{.section-title} ::: {#home-news} ::: ::: listing-more View All News → ::: ------------------------------------------------------------------------ # [Research]{.section-title} ::: {style="color: var(--color-text); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500;"} The CALM Lab’s research is organized around three interconnected areas that together aim to understand the role of attention across contexts of life and mind. ::: :::::::::::: {.grid-3 .section-shell} ::::: {.card .card-interactive .quick-card .is-blue} ### Cognitive Mechanisms How do differences in the ability to control attention relate to cognition and well-being? [View Project →]{.link-cta} ::::: ::::: {.card .card-interactive .quick-card .is-yellow} ### Neural Mechanisms What are the neural mechanisms underlying the ability to control attention? [View Project →]{.link-cta} ::::: ::::: {.card .card-interactive .quick-card .is-green} ### Mindfulness How can mindfulness and contemplative practices strengthen attention control and well-being? [View Project →]{.link-cta} ::::: :::::::::::: ### Latest Publications ::: {#home-publications} ::: ::: listing-more View All Publications → :::
